sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Short Interest in Verisk Analytics, Inc. (NASDAQ:VRSK) Increases By 25.1%
feed.summary: Short interest in Verisk Analytics (NASDAQ:VRSK) increased by 25.1% in March, reaching 6,064,945 shares, which represents about 4.7% of shares outstanding. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating EPS estimates and increasing revenue by 5.8% year-over-year. Verisk also authorized a $2.5 billion stock buyback and raised its quarterly dividend to $0.50 per share.

feed.title: Alibaba launches 3D AI model to challenge Tencent
feed.summary: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. has unveiled "Happy Oyster," a new 3D AI model capable of generating virtual environments and interactive video, positioning itself to directly challenge Tencent Holdings Ltd. in the gaming and content creation sectors. This launch signifies Alibaba's deepening strategic shift into high-growth AI and cloud services, with ambitious revenue targets. The company is accelerating its AI product releases and reorganizing its business to emphasize monetization, intensifying competition with Tencent and other global tech players in the rapidly evolving AI landscape.

feed.title: Aspire Biopharma Has Entered Into a Letter of Intent to Acquire a Leading Global Automotive Supplier With a 100+ Year History and $200M+ in 2025 Revenue
feed.summary: Aspire Biopharma Holdings, Inc. announced its Letter of Intent to acquire Dura Driver Control Systems (DCS), a leading global automotive supplier. The acquisition, valued at $30 million in cash, is expected to transform Aspire into a diversified, high-revenue enterprise, leveraging DCS's robust financial performance of over $200 million in revenue and $20 million in Adjusted EBITDA for FY2025. DCS specializes in automotive driver control systems with a strong patent portfolio and global manufacturing presence.

feed.title: Jefferies Adjusts Price Target on CenterPoint Energy to $49 From $44, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Jefferies has increased its price target for CenterPoint Energy (NYSE: CNP) to $49 from $44, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment comes after other analysts like Barclays and Morgan Stanley also recently updated their price targets for CenterPoint Energy, reflecting ongoing analysis of the company's financial outlook and market performance. CenterPoint Energy specializes in natural gas and electricity distribution, with recent activities including bond offerings and executive changes.

feed.title: Micron Technology Stock: Still An Incredible Value, Even After Its 530% Run (NASDAQ:MU)
feed.summary: Micron Technology is presented as a strong value investment despite a significant 12-month rally. The company is poised to benefit from persistent global memory shortages driven by AI demand, exhibiting impressive year-over-year revenue growth and robust net margins. With favorable valuation metrics and less exposure to energy market fragility compared to competitors, Micron remains an attractive option for investors.

feed.title: Drug developer targets $200M auto supplier in $30M deal
feed.summary: Aspire Biopharma (NASDAQ:ASBP), a biopharmaceutical company, has signed a Letter of Intent to acquire Dura Driver Control Systems (DCS), a global automotive supplier, for $30 million in cash. DCS reported over $200 million in revenue and $20 million in adjusted EBITDA for FY2025 (unaudited), marking a significant diversification for Aspire Biopharma from its biotech focus into the automotive industry. The acquisition is subject to due diligence and a U.S. GAAP audit, and if completed, will bolster DCS's management with experienced automotive leadership.

feed.title: One click instead of tab-switching: UiPath adds Salesforce AI tools
feed.summary: UiPath has launched two new offerings on Salesforce's AgentExchange: UiPath CX Companion and UiPath Maestro Connector. These tools integrate AI-powered automation and orchestration into agent-driven workflows across Salesforce and other enterprise systems. The aim is to eliminate friction, manual processes, and disconnected data, allowing teams to focus on outcomes.

feed.title: Amaze activates distribution engine with Food Channel
feed.summary: Amaze (NYSE American: AMZE) launched its Food Channel on April 16, 2026, activating the distribution layer of its creator-commerce platform. This model integrates creator-led content, commerce conversion, and partner distribution, notably accessing the Los Angeles Times network of over 47 million monthly users, to generate near-term revenue. Amaze plans to expand this strategy across Music, Gaming, Health, and Lifestyle verticals, aiming to convert content engagement into repeatable transactions within the growing creator economy.

feed.title: AMETEK will post quarterly results before markets open April 30
feed.summary: AMETEK (NYSE: AME) announced that it will release its first-quarter 2026 earnings before market open on Thursday, April 30, 2026. The company will also host a live investor conference call and webcast on the same day at 8:30 AM ET. The webcast and its replay will be accessible through the Investors section of Ametek's website.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Launches Applied Biosystems™ PowerFlex™ Thermal Cycler to Advance PCR Flexibility and Productivity
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific has launched the Applied Biosystems™ PowerFlex™ Thermal Cycler, a new PCR instrument designed to enhance flexibility, thermal performance, and productivity in molecular biology labs. This next-generation system aims to address the growing demand for accurate and fast PCR results, especially in labs with complex workflows and shared instruments. Key features include fast and precise thermal performance, intuitive operation via a touchscreen, and flexible configurations, including a 3x32-well model for simultaneous independent experiments.

feed.title: NetApp expands Google Cloud partnership for sovereign AI
feed.summary: NetApp has signed a four-year enterprise agreement with Google Cloud to integrate its storage solutions into Google Distributed Cloud air-gapped (GDC). This partnership aims to provide secure, sovereign AI capabilities for government and defense organizations with sensitive data requirements. The collaboration will enable these organizations to deploy cloud technology and AI in controlled, air-gapped environments with enhanced security and data management.

feed.title: Acurx Pharmaceuticals raises $2.5M in direct offering
feed.summary: Acurx Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:ACXP) announced a direct offering of 825,085 shares of common stock at $3.03 per share, aiming to raise approximately $2.5 million before expenses. Concurrently, it will issue unregistered short-term warrants that could generate an additional $4.6 million if fully exercised. The company plans to use the net proceeds for working capital and general corporate purposes, with analysts maintaining optimistic price targets.

feed.title: Baird Adjusts Republic Services Price Target to $240 From $242, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Baird has adjusted its price target for Republic Services (RSG) to $240, down from $242, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This update reflects a slight downward revision in their valuation for the environmental services company. The article also lists recent analyst actions on Republic Services from other firms, including JPMorgan, Wells Fargo, UBS, and Barclays.

feed.title: Ball Corp stock (US0584981064): Is sustainable packaging now the real growth lever?
feed.summary: Ball Corp, a major player in aluminum beverage packaging, is positioned to benefit from the growing global demand for sustainable products. The company's focus on infinitely recyclable aluminum cans aligns with consumer and regulatory trends towards eco-conscious solutions, making it an attractive option for investors interested in steady returns from essential consumer trends. Despite potential risks like aluminum price volatility, Ball Corp's strong market position, innovation in packaging, and asset-light business model suggest compounded growth, particularly as sustainability premiums materialize.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts UDR Price Target to $35 From $39, Maintains Sell Rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has lowered its price target for UDR, Inc. (NYSE: UDR) to $35 from $39, while maintaining a Sell rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a revised outlook from the financial institution for the residential REIT. The article also lists recent price target adjustments from other firms such as Jefferies, RBC Capital, and KeyBanc.

feed.title: Jefferies Adjusts Price Target on Sempra to $100 From $97, Maintains Hold Rating
feed.summary: Jefferies has adjusted its price target on Sempra (SRE) to $100, up from the previous target of $97, while maintaining a "Hold" rating on the stock. This update reflects a revised valuation perspective for the utility company. The article also notes other recent analyst actions on Sempra, including Barclays lifting its price target to $105 and maintaining an "Overweight" rating.

feed.title: Elliott’s Board Overhaul at Norwegian Cruise Line: Is a $25 Target Still Too Conservative?
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) is undergoing a leadership overhaul and facing investor pressure from Elliott Investment Management, which believes the company is undervalued at $56 per share. Despite historical underperformance, a new board and CEO are in place, with a focus on improving execution and aligning commercial strategy, particularly with the upcoming Great Tides Waterpark opening. While analysts' mean target is $25, Elliott's higher target suggests significant upside if the company can successfully implement its turnaround strategy and improve net yield growth.

feed.title: Rogers Satellite coverage expands to U.S. through T-Mobile partnership
feed.summary: Rogers Communications Inc. is partnering with T-Mobile to expand its satellite-to-mobile coverage into the U.S., allowing customers to use app-based voice calls, text messages, and certain applications while roaming out of cellular network range. The service, T-Satellite, covers 1.3 million square kilometres in the U.S. and, like Rogers Satellite, relies on Elon Musk's Starlink. This move provides Rogers customers with included satellite-to-mobile roaming in available plans, while rival Canadian companies Telus and Bell plan similar services through partnerships with AST SpaceMobile.

feed.title: Republic Services (NYSE:RSG) Given New $240.00 Price Target at Robert W. Baird
feed.summary: Robert W. Baird has set a new price target of $240.00 for Republic Services (NYSE:RSG), lowering it slightly from $242.00 while maintaining a "neutral" rating. This new target implies a potential upside of 13.71% for the stock. Despite the slight downgrade, analyst consensus for Republic Services remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $247.00.

feed.title: Energy Fuels Appoints Ross Bhappu as New CEO
feed.summary: Energy Fuels Inc., a key U.S. producer of critical materials, has named Ross R. Bhappu as its new Chief Executive Officer. Bhappu's extensive industry background and strategic vision are expected to lead the company's expansion in uranium, rare earths, and other vital materials crucial for the clean energy transition. This appointment comes at a pivotal time as Energy Fuels aims to strengthen its leadership in the sector.

feed.title: Allegion PLC to Issue Quarterly Dividend of $0.55 (NYSE:ALLE)
feed.summary: Allegion PLC (NYSE:ALLE) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.55 per share, to be paid on June 30th to shareholders of record on June 15th. This dividend represents an annualized payment of $2.20 and a yield of 1.6%. The company has a history of 11 consecutive years of dividend increases, with a healthy payout ratio of approximately 26%.

feed.title: Humana Inc. Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.89 (NYSE:HUM)
feed.summary: Humana Inc. announced a quarterly dividend of $0.885 per share, payable on July 31st to shareholders of record on June 26th, representing an approximate 1.8% yield. The company's dividend appears well-covered with a payout ratio of 24.1%, expected to rise to 27.0% next year. While recent earnings beat estimates and revenue increased, analyst sentiment is mixed with some price target increases countered by reductions and a "Strong Sell" rating from Zacks Research.

feed.title: Short Interest in Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE:FRT) Increases By 27.9%
feed.summary: Short interest in Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE:FRT) significantly increased by 27.9% in March, reaching over 3.2 million shares, indicating growing bearish sentiment. Despite this, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $112.43. The company reported a Q1 EPS miss but revenue growth, and it offers a quarterly dividend of $1.13, equating to a 4.1% yield.

feed.title: 3,519 Shares in Teradyne, Inc. $TER Acquired by U.S. Capital Wealth Advisors LLC
feed.summary: U.S. Capital Wealth Advisors LLC recently acquired 3,519 shares of Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ:TER) valued at approximately $681,000, contributing to the stock's 99.77% institutional ownership. This acquisition follows strong quarterly results where Teradyne exceeded EPS and revenue expectations, and positive analyst sentiment, with a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average target price of $289.53. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.12 per share.

feed.title: U.S. Capital Wealth Advisors LLC Sells 12,153 Shares of Duke Energy Corporation $DUK
feed.summary: U.S. Capital Wealth Advisors LLC significantly reduced its stake in Duke Energy Corporation, selling 12,153 shares and retaining 8,212 shares valued at $963,000. This divestment occurred amidst mixed analyst sentiment and Duke Energy's efforts to recover over $800 million in winter fuel costs in North Carolina, which has raised regulatory and political concerns. Other institutional investors, however, have been increasing their positions in Duke Energy, indicating varied investment strategies.

feed.title: Starbucks Corporation (NASDAQ:SBUX) to Issue Quarterly Dividend of $0.62
feed.summary: Starbucks (NASDAQ:SBUX) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.62 per share, payable on May 29th to shareholders of record by May 15th, annualizing to $2.48 and yielding approximately 2.5%. The dividend's payout ratio is currently 82.9%, but analysts project it to decrease to 67.8% next year with expected EPS growth. Despite missing recent quarterly EPS estimates and providing cautious FY26 guidance, the company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $104.57.

feed.title: Regions Financial Corporation (NYSE:RF) Announces $0.27 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Regions Financial Corporation (NYSE:RF) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.265 per share, payable on July 1st to shareholders of record as of June 1st, representing a 3.8% yield. The bank has consistently raised its dividend for 12 consecutive years, with a sustainable payout ratio of approximately 43%. Despite missing recent earnings estimates, analysts project continued EPS growth for the current and next fiscal year, supporting the dividend.

feed.title: Carrier Global Corporation Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.24 (NYSE:CARR)
feed.summary: Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE:CARR) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.24 per share, payable on May 22nd to shareholders of record on May 4th. This news follows the company's recent earnings report where they slightly missed analyst expectations, reporting $0.34 EPS against an anticipated $0.36, with revenue down 6% year-over-year. Despite the miss, the dividend appears sustainable given Carrier's payout ratio of 27.7% and projected future earnings.

feed.title: Oracle jumps as it expands AWS deal for multicloud networking (ORCL:NYSE)
feed.summary: Oracle's shares rose over 4% in premarket trading after the company announced an expanded deal with Amazon Web Services (AWS) for multicloud networking. This collaboration aims to enhance their offerings in the multicloud space. Amazon's shares showed little change following the news.

feed.title: Caterpillar Stock Slides 3% Following Reports of Monarch Tractor Acquisition
feed.summary: Caterpillar (CAT) stock dropped 3% following reports of its acquisition of Monarch Tractor, a startup specializing in self-driving electric tractors. While neither company officially confirmed the deal, Monarch had previously indicated its technology was sold to a large equipment manufacturer and sources identified Caterpillar as the buyer. Investors are questioning the strategic fit given Monarch's struggles and Caterpillar's core business being distinct from agriculture, though the acquisition could align with Caterpillar's focus on autonomy and electrification.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reconsider Texas Pacific Land (TPL) After The Recent Share Price Pullback?
feed.summary: Texas Pacific Land (TPL) has experienced a recent share price pullback, declining 6.9% in the last week and 20.8% in the last month, despite strong long-term returns. Simply Wall St's Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests TPL is overvalued by 23.5% at its current price of $417 per share, with an intrinsic value of $337.88. Additionally, its current P/E ratio of 59.76x is significantly higher than the Oil and Gas industry average and its calculated Fair Ratio of 23.12x, further indicating overvaluation.

feed.title: The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE:PNC) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: PNC Financial Services Group (NYSE:PNC) reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, beating expectations with an EPS of $4.13. The company saw significant organic loan growth, expanded net interest margin, and 13% year-over-year fee income growth, driven partly by the acquisition of FirstBank. Executives Bill Demchak and Rob Reilly discussed their cautious but optimistic outlook, emphasizing strong business momentum, strategic investments in technology and branches, and robust credit quality despite broader market concerns.

feed.title: Principal Financial Group, Inc. $PFG Shares Sold by Tudor Investment Corp ET AL
feed.summary: Tudor Investment Corp. significantly reduced its stake in Principal Financial Group (PFG) by 97.1% in Q3, selling over 190,000 shares. This comes amidst accelerated insider selling, with CEO Deanna Strable-Soethout selling 9,300 shares and total insider disposals reaching $2.32 million in the last 90 days. Despite institutional ownership of about 75%, analysts maintain a "Hold" rating with an average target price of $93.44.

feed.title: Microsoft Corporation $MSFT is Udine Wealth Management Inc.'s 3rd Largest Position
feed.summary: Udine Wealth Management Inc. increased its stake in Microsoft Corporation by 3.7% in Q4, making it their third-largest position. The article details recent insider transactions, Microsoft's strong quarterly earnings beat, and its declared quarterly dividend. It also covers analyst ratings, price performance, and key positive and negative headlines impacting the company, particularly regarding its significant AI/data-center investments.

feed.title: Avino Silver & Gold Unveils First Consolidated Mineral Reserves, Boosting Long-Term Outlook
feed.summary: Avino Silver & Gold has published its first consolidated mineral reserve estimate for its Mexican properties, revealing 127 million silver equivalent ounces in proven and probable reserves. This update converts 42% of resources into reserves and increases measured and indicated resources by 9%, enhancing the company's long-term production outlook and supporting decades of mine life. An analyst has rated the stock a "Buy" with a C$12.75 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst Spark gives it a "Neutral" score.

feed.title: 2026 State of Healthcare Supply Chain IT: 75 page e-Book
feed.summary: Black Book Research's new 75-page e-book, "The State of Healthcare Supply Chain Technology 2026," reveals that healthcare supply chain is a critical board-level margin-control issue, not just a back-office function. The report, based on a survey of 1,335 healthcare supply chain professionals, highlights weak visibility, slow substitute approvals, and manual workflows as major factors eroding margins and continuity of care. It identifies control towers, workflow orchestration, and connected supply chain IT as essential solutions, indicating a significant replacement cycle for supply chain applications is underway to address these challenges.

feed.title: Deep losses and new capital in LQR House (Nasdaq: YHC) 2025 annual report
feed.summary: LQR House Inc. (NASDAQ: YHC) reported a net loss of $25.5 million in its 2025 annual report, prompting its auditor to express substantial doubt about the company's ability to continue as a going concern. The company raised significant capital throughout 2025 from stock programs and warrant exercises to fund operations and settle prior litigation. LQR House also announced a large acquisition agreement for Fusion Five Continents Securities Limited, a securities brokerage firm, indicating a strategic diversification despite ongoing financial challenges.

feed.title: Bank of America Corporation (NYSE:BAC) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Bank of America (NYSE:BAC) reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, with revenue up 7% to $30.3 billion and EPS up 25% to $1.11, exceeding expectations. The company saw growth across all segments, positive operating leverage, and robust client activity, leading to an increased full-year NII growth guidance of 6% to 8%. Executives highlighted the effective use of technology, including AI, to drive efficiency and maintain a strong capital position and credit quality despite geopolitical uncertainties.

feed.title: XPeng GX Pre-sale Starts at RMB0.3998M; He Xiaopeng Says No Plans to Enter Home Appliance Sector
feed.summary: XPeng (09868.HK) has launched the pre-sale of its new full-size flagship SUV, the XPeng GX, with both pure electric and extended-range variants starting at RMB399,800. This model is built on XPENG-W's SEPA 3.0 physical AI technology architecture, incorporating advanced technologies like Robotaxi intelligent driving and flying car safety redundancy. Chairman He Xiaopeng stated that the company currently has no plans to expand into the home appliance sector, citing the existing challenges of building cars.

feed.title: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Lowers Ares Capital (NASDAQ:ARCC) Price Target to $21.00
feed.summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods has reduced its price target for Ares Capital (NASDAQ:ARCC) to $21.00 from $22.00, while maintaining an "outperform" rating, suggesting a potential 10.7% upside. The company reported Q4 EPS of $0.50 (in line) and revenue slightly below estimates at $793 million. Significant insider buying by CFO Scott C. Lem and CEO Michael Kort Schnabel in February signals management confidence, with 27.38% of the stock owned by institutional investors.

feed.title: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Issues Pessimistic Forecast for FS KKR Capital (NYSE:FSK) Stock Price
feed.summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods recently lowered its price target for FS KKR Capital (NYSE:FSK) from $15 to $11, maintaining a "market perform" rating, reflecting a broader pessimistic outlook from analysts. The company's stock is trading near its 12-month low after missing recent earnings and revenue estimates. Despite this, insider Daniel Pietrzak purchased 5,000 shares, increasing his stake in the company.

feed.title: Allogene Therapeutics (NASDAQ:ALLO) Upgraded to "Neutral" at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. upgraded Allogene Therapeutics (NASDAQ:ALLO) from "underweight" to "neutral," signaling a less negative near-term outlook. Despite a recent public offering of 87.5 million shares at $2.00, which caused a 13% stock slide due to dilution concerns, several analysts have raised their price targets, and the company maintains an average "Moderate Buy" rating. The upgrade follows positive clinical data for ALLO-329 and ALPHA3, even as insider selling continues to be noted.

feed.title: Rogers Satellite coverage expands to U.S. through T-Mobile partnership
feed.summary: Rogers Communications Inc. is partnering with T-Mobile to expand its satellite-to-mobile coverage into the United States. This collaboration, using Elon Musk's Starlink technology, will enable Rogers' customers to make app-based calls, send texts, and use certain applications while roaming in the U.S. outside of cellular network range. The service will be included at no extra cost for customers on certain Rogers plans with U.S. coverage.

feed.title: 12 Industrials Stocks Moving In Thursday's Pre-Market Session
feed.summary: This article lists 12 industrials stocks that saw significant movement in Thursday's pre-market session, categorizing them into gainers and losers. It provides details on each company's stock symbol, price, percentage change, and market capitalization, along with mentions of recent earnings reports for some.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (PLD) Prologis, Inc. Reports Q1 Revenue $2.30B, vs. FactSet Est of $2.12B
feed.summary: Prologis, Inc. (PLD) reported its Q1 revenue of $2.30 billion, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $2.12 billion. This financial update indicates a stronger-than-expected performance for the first quarter.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts Price Target on Jacobs Solutions to $155 From $163, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has updated its price target for Jacobs Solutions (J) shares, lowering it to $155 from the previous $163. Despite this adjustment, the firm has decided to maintain its "Buy" rating on the engineering and consulting company. This news comes amidst other analyst adjustments for Jacobs Solutions, highlighting ongoing evaluation of the company's financial outlook.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts Price Target on Hewlett Packard Enterprise to $30 From $29, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has increased its price target for Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) to $30 from $29, while maintaining a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook from the investment bank on HPE's future performance. The article also notes that Raymond James recently trimmed its price target for HPE to $29 from $30, maintaining an Outperform rating, highlighting differing analyst views on the company.

feed.title: AMD Anchors France's AI Strategy With Exascale Supercomputer Partnership
feed.summary: AMD has partnered with the French government to bolster France's national AI strategy, providing hardware, software, and training, including support for the Alice Recoque exascale supercomputer. Analysts see strong AI upside for AMD, with Bernstein SocGen Group raising its price forecast to $265, but some valuation concerns persist. The stock is currently trading near its 52-week high, with strong technical indicators suggesting continued bullish momentum.

feed.title: Abbott Stock Tumbles on Earnings. Nutrition Business Is Struggling and Merger Costs Biting.
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories reported first-quarter earnings that slightly exceeded analyst expectations, but its shares fell. This decline was attributed to persistent struggles in its nutrition business and the anticipated dilutive impact of its acquisition of Exact Sciences on full-year earnings.

feed.title: Modular Medical Regains Compliance with Nasdaq Minimum Bid Price Requirement
feed.summary: Modular Medical, Inc. (NASDAQ:MODD) announced it has regained compliance with the Nasdaq Capital Market's minimum bid price requirement. The company received a letter from Nasdaq confirming that its common stock maintained a closing bid price above $1.00 for ten consecutive trading days as of April 14, 2026. This resolves the previous non-compliance issue regarding Nasdaq Marketplace Rule 5550(a)(2).
